steps.title: Match the appositive
steps.content: “A government body officially known as the Althing” is an introductory appositive. The words after the comma must identify that same body and then complete the sentence.

steps.title: Avoid dangling subjects
steps.content: B, C, and D make something other than Iceland's parliament the subject, so the opening appositive dangles. The completion that begins with Iceland's parliament names the Althing and supplies the predicate. The answer is A.
